headline: Wall Street Expects Accenture plc (ACN) to Bounce Back Despite a 50% YTD Decline
summary: Accenture plc (NYSE:ACN) has declined more than 50% year-to-date and around 34% since the start of June. While the share price has been hit due to sector-wide margin concerns, the stock plummeted further after management narrowed its full-year local-currency revenue growth forecast from a range of 3% – 5% to 3% – 4%. ​Wall Street […]

headline: Accenture’s Q2 Earnings Call: Our Top 5 Analyst Questions
summary: Accenture’s second-quarter performance was met with a sharp negative market reaction, as investors digested a combination of steady revenue growth and cautious commentary around external disruptions. Management highlighted that broad-based client demand and expanding AI initiatives fueled growth across all regions and service lines.
